raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can reach the front face of box_2 above the 8 cm height of the nearby cup, and there is enough clearance so the end-effector can press gently against the box without disturbing the cup.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is lightly braced against the tabletop by the right end-effector, preventing it from shifting while the other arm manipulates box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The left arm has unobstructed vertical access to the top surface of box_1; the right arm is already stabilizing box_2 to avoid lateral coupling forces between the two adjacent boxes.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector and lifted clear of the tabletop, accomplishing the task of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can reach the front face of box_2 above the 8 cm height of the nearby cup, and there is enough clearance so the end-effector can press gently against the box without disturbing the cup.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is lightly braced against the tabletop by the right end-effector, preventing it from shifting while the other arm manipulates box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: The left arm has unobstructed vertical access to the top surface of box_1; the right arm is already stabilizing box_2 to avoid lateral coupling forces between the two adjacent boxes.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector and lifted clear of the tabletop, accomplishing the task of picking up the darker box.
